notes: Plan audit for Absorb decision on OBPI-0.25.0-33 (airlineops/arb/ core infrastructure absorption). ADR-0.25.0 line 64 explicitly names src/gzkit/arb/ as an integration point and line 139-140 scopes OBPI-33 to opsdev/arb/ receipt advise/validate/pattern extraction. The plan targets exactly this absorption: 7 package modules (paths.py, ruff_reporter.py, step_reporter.py, validator.py, advisor.py, patterns.py, __init__.py), 2 JSON schemas (arb_lint_receipt.schema.json, arb_step_receipt.schema.json), CLI dispatcher (commands/arb.py), dedicated parser module (cli/parser_arb.py — parser_maintenance.py is already at 657L past the 600L soft cap), config wiring (ArbConfig on ProjectConfig), test suite (tests/arb/* + tests/commands/test_arb_cmd.py), behave feature (features/arb.feature), and documentation (docs/user/commands/arb.md + manpages/arb.md). One gap: the brief's Allowed Paths section only lists src/gzkit/, tests/, and the ADR directory — the plan amends Allowed Paths in Step 0 to include data/schemas/, docs/user/commands/, docs/user/manpages/, features/, and .gzkit/rules/arb.md. This is scope-honest, not scope creep: the brief under-scoped at authoring time because it assumed a Confirm outcome; the ADR's integration points (line 64) and feature table entry (line 139) authorize the wider touch surface. Plan-before-exploration advisory (Step 6a): plan mode was entered after substantial pre-plan exploration (reading airlineops sources, git forensics, gzkit config/parser patterns). Destination-in-mind: the user's direct instruction 'we need to onboard it, that is the point of this adr' resolved the decision to Absorb before plan mode was entered. Rejected alternatives: Confirm-with-rule-update (reject: leaves attestation-enrichment.md's fail-closed ARB receipt requirement unsatisfied — the rule demands receipts the infrastructure cannot produce) and Exclude (reject: ARB is explicitly non-airline-specific by design, subtraction test favors absorption, user directly rejected). Forensic root cause of the governance drift: commit 37c891ca (2026-03-15) copied .claude/rules/arb.md wholesale from airlineops as part of a control-surface regeneration; commit 4700b623 (2026-03-18) did a mechanical find-and-replace opsdev→gzkit bundled into an auto-commit with no semantic signal; commit 32dfd36b (same day) canonicalized the renamed content at .gzkit/rules/arb.md; attestation-enrichment.md was later hardened to fail-closed against the phantom surface in 4c7573fc and f350cf44. The plan closes this vacuum by making the rule real — the first attestation in the repository that satisfies the attestation-enrichment rule honestly will be this OBPI's own closeout, citing receipts produced by the CLI surface it creates.
